summary: Implementation compiles and addresses the first UI MVP blockers: voice count shape mismatch, voice mapping access, player state handling, download action, and progress metadata.

findings.message: The voice mapping flow still needs live-backend manual validation with an active pipeline because this environment only validated static TypeScript/export.
Go test suite could not run because Go is unavailable.

accepted_changes: Explore uses VoicesResponse.count/voices.length instead of treating the response as an array.
Player exposes mapping-required banner and opens a voice mapping modal.
VoiceMappingModal reads personas/voices and posts a valid voice map shape.
BookMetadata schema includes backend progress/persona fields used by UI.
Library progress no longer uses placeholder chapter/segment math.
